case_title: VALERIE BLACK et al VS. BRIAN BELIER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED FEB-21-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BELIER, BRIAN (OWNER & STYLIST OF POPULATION SALON )
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLACK, VALERIE CARDENAS, ELAINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BELIER, BRIAN (OWNER & STYLIST OF POPULATION SALON ) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY BLACK, VALERIE CARDENAS, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT BELIER, BRIAN (OWNER & STYLIST OF POPULATION SALON ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
